name: Flow Toxicity, Liquidity Crashes and the Probability of Informed Trading
snippet: VPIN is a predictor of short-term volatility, and they demonstrate how it could have signaled the "flash crash" on May 6, 2010, hours ahead of the actual crash ...

name: Speech: Market Participants and the May 6 Flash Crash (Gregg E. Berman
snippet: May 6, prices for both the E-Mini S&P 500 futures contract, suddenly plunged 5% in just 5 minutes. was dubbed the May 6 Flash Crash.

name: 2010 flash crash - Wikipedia
snippet: A variety of explanations have been forwarded for the crash, including errors in automatic trading systems and deliberate market manipulation.
